seoTitle: Allan vs Allenstown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Allan and Allenstown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Allan and Allenstown.
heading: Allan vs Allenstown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Allan, Queensland and Allenstown, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Allan has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Allenstown (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Allan or Allenstown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Allan has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Allenstown scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Allan scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Allenstown scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Allan or Allenstown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Allan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
